x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Custom business rules on alert and event tables can conflict with Now Assist TSOM AI correlation actions.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.check_script: (function(){var gr=new GlideRecord("sys_script");gr.addQuery("collection","em_alert");gr.addQuery("active",true);gr.addEncodedQuery("sys_created_byNOT INglide.maint,system,admin,fred.luddy");gr.query();var n=gr.getRowCount();return{status:n<=10?"ready":"needs_attention",actualValue:n+" custom BRs on em_alert",finding:"TSOM customization risk: "+n+" custom BRs. "+(n>10?"High customization increases conflict risk with Now Assist TSOM AI correlation.":"Risk within acceptable range.")};})()
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Review custom BRs on em_alert. Test with Now Assist TSOM enabled in sub-production.
